# Third-Party Code

This directory holds small vendored benchmark assets that improve reproducibility for InferGrade container builds.

## Included

- `instruction_following_eval/`
  - Source: Google Research `instruction_following_eval`
  - License: Apache-2.0 (upstream `LICENSE` is vendored in the subtree)
  - Purpose: official IFEval benchmark logic and input data for the first InferGrade instruction-following capability container
  - Retrieved from commit `fa55fe4af97c6756b6fe5b0639464f6b72f37c5a`

The code in these directories remains subject to the upstream project licenses and notices. See [docs/third_party_license_audit.md](../docs/third_party_license_audit.md) for the audit trail.
